arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's likely Tottenham changes vs Nottingham Forest after press conference confession
arts.sum: Kevin Danso made his return from injury in the final few minutes of the Eintracht Frankfurt game as he helped Tottenham see out the win. It is so important that Tottenham follow up their brilliant win at Eintracht Frankfurt with another big performance against Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou and Tottenham could be handed unexpected Europa League final boost by Aston Villa
arts.sum: Playing out a 1-1 draw at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in the first leg, Spurs secured a place in the semi-finals of the competition with a 1-0 win in Germany on Thursday night . If Tottenham and Aston Villa are to go head-to-head that week then the game may possibly be on Wednesday, May 14 due to Spurs' Premier League fixture against Crystal Palace three days earlier.

arts.ttl: How Xabi Alonso could unintentionally boost Tottenham's chances of signing £50m Real Madrid target - opinion
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso could provide an accidental assist to Tottenham 🤯

arts.ttl: Bodo/Glimt handed Europa League semi-final boost vs Tottenham as fixture decision confirmed
arts.sum: Tottenham fans will not have to wait too long for the team's Europa League semi-final showdown against Bodo/Glimt. Ahead of the first-leg tie at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, Bodo/Glimt have learnt of two changes to their Eliteserien schedule around the Europa League clashes .

arts.ttl: 'This manager': Guglielmo Vicario gives his honest assessment on Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham
arts.sum: Guglielmo Vicario has shared his honest thoughts on how he feels about Ange Postecoglou after Tottenham Hotspur reached the final four of the Europa League....

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou drops hint on Tottenham future as he outlines summer plans
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's future is in major doubt, with Tottenham set for their lowest Premier League finish for 31 years, though the Australian is not giving up his job without a fight

arts.ttl: Asking price set: Tottenham make enquiry to sign Brazilian wide player
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are interested in signing the Fiorentina defender Dodo at the end of the season, and they have made an enquiry regarding a summer move. The 26-year-old has done quite well for the Italian club this season, and he has five assists in all competitions. arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Daniel Levy remains keen on bringing Fabio Paratici back to Tottenham Hotspur after his talks with AC Milan collapsed. Paratici’s move...

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Tottenham want 13-G/A youngster with a “lot of quality”, highly-rated by Messi
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Argentine attacking midfielder Nico Paz at the end of the season. The 20-year-old midfielder plays for Como, and he has been outstanding for them since joining the club last summer. The player has six goals and seven assists to his name in the league this season.
